# matomo_tagmanager_tag_binguet (Resource)

Adds the Bing Ads Universal Event Tracking Tag to your website so you can apply conversion tracking to your Bing ad campaigns.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example BingUET Site"
  urls = ["https://example-binguet.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example BingUET Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_trigger" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  type         = "PageView"
  name         = "Example BingUET Trigger"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_tag_binguet" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-binguet"
  fire_trigger_ids = [matomo_tagmanager_trigger.example.id]
  bing_ad_id = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bing_ad_id` (String) You can find the Bing Ad ID when creating a new tracking code in the Bing Ad Campaign Manager.
- `container_id` (String)
- `fire_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `block_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `description` (String) Optional free-text description, shown in Matomo's Tag Manager UI.
- `priority` (Number) Execution priority - lower values fire earlier when multiple tags fire on the same trigger. Matomo defaults to 999 when unset.
- `status` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
